name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV400 protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Lightweight frame with polarized lenses that block 100% of harmful UVA and UVB rays. Ideal for beach, driving, and outdoor activities.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Lightweight floral maxi dress made from breathable cotton blend. Features adjustable straps, a flowy silhouette, and vibrant summer prints. Perfect for beach days, picnics, and casual outings.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant formula lasts up to 80 minutes. Non-greasy, lightweight texture suitable for all skin types.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Giant inflatable flamingo pool float perfect for summer fun. Made from durable, puncture-resistant PVC. Holds up to 220 lbs. Includes repair kit. Great for pools, lakes, and calm ocean waters.

name: Straw Beach Hat
description: Wide-brim woven straw hat with UPF 50+ sun protection. Adjustable inner band for a perfect fit. Foldable design for easy packing. Stylish and functional for beach, garden, and travel.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Spacious waterproof tote bag with multiple compartments. Features a wet/dry separation pocket, insulated cooler section, and sand-proof lining. Perfect for beach days, pool trips, and outdoor adventures.

name: Men's Swim Shorts
description: Quick-dry men's swim shorts with elastic waistband and drawstring. Features side pockets and a mesh lining for comfort. Available in vibrant tropical prints. UPF 30+ sun protection fabric.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothing aloe vera gel that instantly cools and hydrates sun-exposed skin. Enriched with vitamin E and cucumber extract. Alcohol-free formula suitable for sensitive skin. Provides relief from sunburn.
